name: Laptop
description: High performance laptop with a fast processor for smooth multitasking. Comes with large storage space to save files, photos, and videos. Has a long battery life for all day use without frequent charging. Suitable for office work, gaming, online classes, and entertainment.

name: I Phone
description: Latest smartphone with an advanced camera for clear photos and videos. Features a smooth display for better viewing and gaming experience. Delivers powerful performance for apps, multitasking, and browsing. Ideal for daily use, social media, photography, and entertainment.

name: Headphones
description: Noise cancelling headphones that reduce outside sound for better listening. Provides clear audio quality with deep bass and balanced sound. Designed with soft ear cushions for comfortable long time use. Perfect for music, gaming, travel, and online meetings.

name: Camera
description: HD camera with high resolution for sharp and detailed photos. Includes a zoom lens for capturing distant objects clearly. Supports video recording with smooth and clear output quality. Great for travel photography, events, and professional use.

name: Watch
description: Smart watch with fitness tracking to monitor daily activities and steps. Displays notifications for calls, messages, and social media apps. Features a stylish design that matches both casual and formal outfits. Suitable for workouts, office use, and everyday wear.

name: Keyboard
description: Keyboard with smooth typing experience and responsive keys. Built with durable materials for long lasting daily use. Designed with an ergonomic shape for comfortable hand support. Suitable for office work, gaming, and study purposes.

name: Mouse
description: Mouse with accurate tracking for smooth and precise movement. Provides a comfortable grip for long working or gaming sessions. Supports wireless connectivity for easy and flexible use. Ideal for office tasks, browsing, and gaming.

name: Tablet
description: Tablet with a large touchscreen for better viewing and reading. Offers fast performance for browsing, gaming, and watching videos. Includes long battery backup for extended use throughout the day. Suitable for students, office work, and entertainment.

name: Speaker
description: Speaker with powerful bass and clear sound quality. Supports Bluetooth connectivity for wireless music streaming. Compact design makes it easy to carry and place anywhere. Great for parties, home entertainment, and outdoor use.

name: Monitor
description: Monitor with a full HD display for sharp and clear visuals. Produces vibrant colors for a better viewing experience. Slim design saves space and gives a modern look to your desk. Ideal for office work, gaming, editing, and entertainment.

name: Printer
description: Printer with fast printing speed for quick document output. Supports wireless printing from mobile phones and laptops. Produces high quality prints for text documents and images. Useful for office work, school projects, and home use.

name: Gaming Chair
description: Gaming chair with adjustable height for better seating comfort. Comes with soft cushioning and ergonomic back support. Designed to reduce strain during long gaming or work sessions. Perfect for gaming setups, offices, and study rooms.

name: Power Bank
description: Power bank with fast charging support for mobile devices. Compact size makes it easy to carry while traveling. Offers long battery capacity for multiple charging cycles. Useful for trips, office work, and emergency charging.

name: Router
description: Router with high speed internet support for smooth browsing. Provides a strong signal with wide coverage across rooms. Supports multiple devices at the same time without slow performance. Ideal for homes, offices, online classes, and gaming.

name: SSD
description: SSD with fast data transfer speed for quicker performance. Improves system boot time and file loading speed. Built with reliable technology for secure data storage. Suitable for laptops, desktops, gaming, and professional use.

name: Hard Disk
description: Hard disk with large storage capacity for files and backups. Provides durable performance for long term data storage. Offers quick access speed for photos, videos, and documents. Great for personal use, office work, and media storage.

name: USB Drive
description: USB drive with a portable design for easy carrying. Supports fast file transfer between devices and computers. Provides secure storage for important documents and media. Useful for office work, study materials, and backup files.

name: Webcam
description: Webcam with HD video quality for clear online meetings. Includes a built in microphone for better voice communication. Easy to install and compatible with most computers. Suitable for video calls, streaming, online classes, and office meetings.

name: Mic
description: Mic with clear voice recording for professional sound quality. Features noise reduction to reduce unwanted background sound. Suitable for singing, streaming, meetings, and video recording. Compact and easy to connect with computers and devices.

name: VR Headset
description: VR headset with an immersive experience for games and videos. Features a high quality display for realistic visuals. Supports motion tracking for better interaction and control. Perfect for gaming, virtual tours, and entertainment.
